raw_consumer_statement:
Somebody used my Citibank credit card to fraudulently obtain a {$300.00} cash advance. I have had no luck with Citibank getting this amount refunded. Each time I call, I am told that an investigator determined that the Cash was deposited into my Citibank checking account. THIS IS NOT TRUE!!!!!!!!!!!!!! There is absolutely no basis for this statement. 

I keep telling Citibank that this is not true and am getting nowhere.
